LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT'S DORIS MEHLER, STUDIO MEHLER, JAMES SAYLES AND KEN BUGHARDT'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF EXHIBITS JN1 - JN6. THE PUBLIC RECORD ESTABLISHES THAT PLAINTIFF IS A CORPORATION. DEFENDANT IS GRANTED TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND THE CROSS-COMPLAINT TO PLEAD FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A BASIS FOR ITS THEORY OF ESTOPPEL AND THAT SAYLES SIGNED THE CONTRACT IN HIS PERSONAL CAPACITY AS GUARANTOR. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANTS STUDIO MEHLER, DORIS MEHLER, JAMES ALLEN SAYLES AND KEN BURGHARDT'S DEMURRER TO QUAKERMAID CABINETS, INC.'S THIRD AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT FOR MONEY.
APPEARANCES: Leonard E. Marquez, Esq. of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean LLP 510/834-6600 for x-defts & moving parties; Lawrence D. Miller, Esq. of Law Office of Lawrence D. Miller 650/592-9151 for deft/x-complainant & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - overruled. Cross-defendants to answer within 10 days. Although the partnership claims do not appear strong, the facts are not sufficiently clear to sustain the demurrer. The merits of the claim may be readily tested by summary adjudication. The corporate claims are merely an alternative pleading. Cross-complainant to submit proposed form of order. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
